intro: This archive contains 13 articles from April 13 to April 21, 2026, detailing cloud security incidents and analysis. The reporting is dominated by high and critical severity threats, with eight high and two critical alerts among the mix. The activity centers on the threat actor APT41 exploiting vulnerabilities like CVE-2026-33413, which carries a CVSS score of 8.8. These threats have a global impact, primarily targeting the technology, government, healthcare, and cloud services sectors. The collected intelligence provides a focused view of the cloud security landscape during this period.
